{{Infobox group
| name = D’iss
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The D�iss are insectoid aliens that infest planets.}}

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
